MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SMG, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

APPEARANCE: RICH POULSON,ESQ.510/444-3131 FOR DEFENDANT-MOVING PARTY
ROBERT L.FERRIS,ESQ.415/626-6975 FOR PLAINTIFF-OPPOSING PARTY

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. 1.)MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT-DENIED.2.)MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CLAIM FOR NEGLIGENT MAINTENANCE DENIED.DEFENDANT DID NOT SHOW THAT ITS GENERAL CATEGORY OF NEGLIGENT CONDUCT WAS NOT SUFFICIENTLY LIKELY TO RESULT IN HARM EXPERIENCED.3.) MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO CLAIM FOR FAILURE TO WARM OF DANGEROUS CONDITION DENIED.DEFENDANT FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT IT DID NOT HAVE A DUTY TO WARN.4.)MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO OWNERSHIP OF POSTERITY ON WHICH A DANGEROUS CONDITIONS EXISTED DENIED.FAILURE TO SHOW THAT THE CIRCUIT BREAKERS AND LIGHTING PANELS WER NOT IN DANGEROUS CONDITION.ORDER SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT NOT SIGNED, JUDGE ALVARADO TO REVIEW THE SAME.(302/PA/AA)ROBERT BALIAN #5220
